item.title: Synthetic YOLO Dataset Generator - vision - PyTorch Forums
item.description: It’s like a virtual data factory – great for augmenting real datasets or getting data for rare scenarios. I used this generator to create a dataset of 5k images for a custom object detector, and it significantly boosted my model’s accuracy.

item.title: Building a Vision Inspection CNN for an Industrial Application
item.description: In this article, we develop and code a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) for a vision inspection classification task in the automotive electronics industry.

item.title: Hands-on Time Series Anomaly Detection using Autoencoders, with ...
item.description: This blog post is to guide the reader towards the idea of anomaly detection with Neural Networks, combining the two subjects in one unique piece of code.

item.title: Train YOLO for Object Detection on a Custom Dataset using Python
item.description: YOLO expects to find certain files and folders set up correctly in order to do the training on your custom dataset.

item.title: Where to Start when Data is Limited: A Guide | Towards Data Science
item.description: Explore GANs, VAEs, or diffusion models to produce synthetic data – but this often requires careful tuning, domain-aware constraints, and enough data to capture the underlying distribution.

item.title: Identify Potatoes - Python - OpenCV Forum
item.description: automated optical inspection for industrial use always depends on stable lighting. that's the most robust way to ensure reliable results

item.title: Outlier Detection With Autoencoders - Towards Data Science
item.description: In this article, you will learn how to build an outlier detector using autoencoders in Tensorflow in only a few lines.
